content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Comprehensive review of the failure reconciliation implementation. All 794 tests pass, cargo clippy -D warnings is clean, cargo fmt --check passes. The implementation correctly follows the success_reconciliation pattern: failures are recorded with BeadFailed journal events, beads are NOT closed on failure (verified by dedicated test), attempt counting works across retries and replacement projects with escalation to NeedsOperator after 3 failures, idempotency is enforced (duplicate calls don't double-count), and structured tracing is present (warn on each failure, error on escalation). The controller state machine changes correctly add Blocked->Running and Blocked->Reconciling transitions, and the Blocked state now preserves active bead/task context. The fs adapter changes properly handle historical failure repair, stale replay protection, and task_id provenance backfill. No critical bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
